angrymobs.configuration.aggressiveAnimal: When true makes all vanilla animals attack you on sight
angrymobs.configuration.angryAnimals.too: When true makes all vanilla animals attack you if you hurt them
angrymobs.configuration.title: Angry Mobs Config
angrymobs.configuration.useAttributes.to: When true makes the melee goals add the mobs attack damage and knockback onto the specified values
